note: 크레파스 리워크 3종: 무지개 스펙트럼 트레일(single, 반투명은 코드 setAlpha 처리 전제), 트레일 반짝임 루프(decal_ 접두사=루프 등록), 그리기 연출용 크레파스 본체 재생성. trail/decal은 지면 장식 특성상 outline/alignment 면제.

jobs.prompt: Single pixel art game asset: one long thick horizontal crayon stroke drawn from left to right, whose color shifts smoothly through the rainbow spectrum, red at the far left blending gradually through orange, yellow, green, cyan and blue to violet at the far right, with many gradual in-between hues and dithered pixel blending where neighbouring colors meet, absolutely no hard vertical color boundaries and no separate solid color blocks. The stroke has slightly rough waxy crayon edges with tiny pigment speckles, stays roughly the same thickness along its length and tapers to a thin scratchy broken tip at both ends. Just the one stroke and nothing else, no crayon stick, no hands, no character, no drop shadow on the background.

Abstract sparkle particle effect ONLY (this is a visual light effect, NOT a character or creature). A 1x4 horizontal pixel-art sprite strip: exactly 4 equal-width columns on a solid magenta #FF00FF background, each column showing the same tiny cluster of three small four-pointed twinkle stars (white, pale yellow, pale pink) floating on empty magenta space, drawn as hard-edged opaque pixel dots with a few 1px diagonal shine rays, no soft glow, no blur. The three star positions are identical in every frame; only their size and brightness change to make a seamless twinkle loop: frame 1 left star big and bright, frame 2 middle star big, frame 3 right star big, frame 4 all three small dim dots. Nothing else in the image: no character, no creature, no slime, no face.
jobs.style_clause: 16-bit SNES-era pixel art, crisp uniform pixel grid, limited palette matching the reference images, solid magenta background #FF00FF, tiny abstract sparkle light particles only, absolutely no characters, no creatures, no slime, no blob, no animal, no face, no eyes, no mouth, no body, no letters no words no numbers

jobs.prompt: Single pixel art in-game weapon sprite: one crayon with a plain ivory-white paper wrapper (completely plain wrapper, no letters) and a rounded waxy tip colored with small rainbow bands of red, yellow, green and blue, lying diagonally pointing to the upper right as if actively drawing. Just the one crayon object and nothing else, no hands, no character, no drop shadow on the background.
